programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Efraín se pone celoso al ver a Consuelo interesada en otro hombre. Cynthia llora al saber que Rogelio no la entregará en el altar. Rogelio presenta a Margarito como su hijo ante el pueblo.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras
programme.desc: Leslie le pide a Leonardo poderse despedir de José Luis diciéndole que siempre lo llevará en el corazón y muere frente al mar. Darío se escapa de prisión.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Justo y Margarita tienen un vínculo eléctrico difícil de sostener. Ella lo amenaza, él responde. Bárbara decide practicarse un aborto.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alejandro está al tanto de que el bebé de Bárbara es de otro hombre y decide hablar con Alfonsina. ¿Podrán arreglar las cosas?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Álvaro responsabiliza a Bárbara por algunas de sus decisiones. Ella se dirige a El manantial porque quiere encontrarse con Alfonsina.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: El doctor Luna se encuentra grave y Justo acude a la clínica. ¿Qué intenciones tendrá?

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica vende zapatos de piel por catálogo y Ludovico se pone muy celoso porque está ganando mucho dinero y decide competir con ella vendiendo ropa interior para mujer, pero es detenido por vender sin permiso.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se compromete a llevar a toda la familia al cine, pero las cosas no salen como esperaba y al final ninguno logra disfrutar la película.

programme.desc: Ludoviquito se lleva el carro sin el permiso de Ludovico, lo choca y su padre deberá pagar la reparación. Ludoviquito comienza a robar partes de autos cuando su padre lo castiga.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía habla con Alma y le pide consejos sobre la primera relación sexual. Los estudiantes del colegio Elite defienden su lugar en el torneo intercolegial. Javier entra a la habitación de Roberta y roba su diario.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel visita a Sabrina, ella le confiesa que tiene un retraso de 10 días. Mía, Dulce y Celina confiesan la verdad sobre el secuestro de Sol. Roberta escucha a Miguel contarle a Diego que sospecha que Sabrina está embarazada.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Don Agustín cae a un barranco por tratar de escapar del asilo. Sofía le confiesa al padre Tadeo que se entregó a Juan por amor.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Sofía queda impactada al saber que Eva estaba enamorada de su padre. Sofía le pide de nuevo su libertad a Fernando pero el se niega.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre

programme.title: Santo y Blue Demon en la Atlántida
programme.desc: Un científico nazi, usando la ciudad perdida de Atlantis como su base de operaciones, amenaza con destruir la civilización con una bomba nuclear. El científico nazi quiere que el Tercer Reich empiece a gobernar de nuevo y si sus demandas no se cumplen, él seguirá adelante con su amenaza de aniquilación nuclear. Con muy poco tiempo que perder, Santo es enlistado para encontrar la bomba nuclear, desarmarla y poner fin al plan diabólico del científico nazi.

programme.title: El capitán Mantarraya
programme.desc: El capitán de un pequeño bote narra sus interesantes aventuras en el mar a un grupo de niños de su aldea.

programme.title: Gregorio y Su Ángel
programme.desc: En México, un anciano (Broderick Crawford) alcohólico hace amistad con una niña pequeña que es como un ángel.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma

programme.title: Pobres millonarios

programme.title: Las señoritas Vivanco

programme.title: ¡Pura vida!

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pedir perdón que pedir permiso
programme.desc: Desde niño, Pepe ha pensado que su mamá había muerto. Conoce a una mujer mayor, de la cual piensa que se ha enamorado, sin saber que el destino le tiene preparado una fuerte noticia que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Doncellez y preñez no pueden ser a la vez
programme.desc: Galia es una chica cuyo máximo sueño es bailar. Junto con sus amigas Cintia y Julls asisten a una especie de clínica de baile con uno de los mejores profesores de danza. No se imaginan la mala experiencia que tendrán que vivir.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Quien por malos caminos anda, malos abrojos halla
programme.desc: Una joven y su padre sufren un asalto y al intentar proteger a su hija él le dispara al ladrón. Los hijos del ladrón deciden vengarse del asesino de su padre, pero el hermano menor no está de acuerdo a lo que se dedica su familia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una mujer sufre un asalto y su pareja le aconseja que vaya a poner una denuncia, pero ella teme hacerlo. La policía logra atrapar al ladrón que asaltó a la mujer, pero por falta de pruebas queda libre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Una caída más es una caída menos
programme.desc: Xitlali vive con su papá. En la escuela, algunos de sus compañeros le quieren enseñar a tomar y fumar, pero una maestra se da cuenta y la manda a que asista a clases de box. Sin embargo, a su padre no le parece bien que aprenda ese deporte.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Al peligro con tiento y al remedio con tiempo

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La desgracia de un hombre que con fuerza y voluntad cambió su vida tratando de ayudar a sus seres amados.

programme.desc: Un programa especial que muestra la vida de cuatro jugadores de fútbol americano en Brownsville, Texas, quienes se enfrentan a una dura realidad de violencia, pobreza, drogas, pero siempre con ilusión de una vida mejor.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Ante la incompetencia de las autoridades, muchos familiares se han convertido en investigadores privados aficionados dispuestos a enfrentar riesgos. Ellos dicen vivir una carrera contra el tiempo para evitar que sus seres queridos desaparezcan.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Frontera: las rutas de la crisis
programme.desc: Una avalancha de inmigrantes abarrota la frontera y pone a prueba la capacidad del gobierno para manejar una nueva crisis humanitaria, la tensión entre ciudades fronterizas crece.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets an exclusive and in-depth tour of the Detroit Historical Society's backroom collection, showcasing priceless Detroit icons. These rare cars are meticulously preserved in climate-controlled bubbles known as car capsules to suspend and slow the aging process so future generations have the opportunity to enjoy them.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Cliff who has a great collection of cars but Tom's main interest is with Cliff's son's 1957 Austin A35. The 1957 Austin A35 was restored by an anonymous person as part of a charity program.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: From his starting point in Midland, Texas, Tom and the Ford wagon cover solid ground and make it to Lubbock, Texas before a grouping of cars held captive behind a chain-link fence capture his attention.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom heads to Great Britain in search of some exotic barn finds and has some great luck at his first location where he discovers a Mercedes-Benz 500SEC AMG and a Jaguar XJS TWR.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom forgoes driving his 1939 Ford Woody Wagon in favor of another car that he's owned for years: his Fern Mist 1953 Ford Ranch Wagon.

programme.title: All for Nothing?
programme.desc: Things really heat up for Lisa when she loses Christie and struggles to complete projects without her reno partner while Andrew and Michelle struggle to complete their renovation nightmare.Things really heat up for Lisa when she loses Christie and struggles to complete projects without her reno partner while Andrew and Michelle struggle to complete their renovation nightmare.

programme.title: All for Nothing?
programme.desc: It's the battle of the condominiums as Chris and Nora have a slow reno start and are unlucky in fundraising while Lisa and Danny strike the community jackpot but are delayed in their important bathroom project.

programme.title: All for Nothing?
programme.desc: AJ and Ashley attempt to repair two years' worth of smelly pet damage to their home while their competition Mitch, with new girlfriend Laura, faces the past as he de-clutters and updates the home his father left to him.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Living Room (Vern Yip) + Dining Room (Chenault James)
programme.desc: Vern Yip creates a stunning foyer and a living room that's practically indestructible. Meanwhile, Kentucky designer Chenault James was determined to change that dialogue for our Whole Home Concept House. Her ace in the hole: commissioning her husband, Ed James of Four Boards Woodworking, to craft a shape-shifting table with three distinct uses.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Music Room (Monet Masters of Forbes + Masters) + Back Porch (Barclay Butera)
programme.desc: With the overwhelming task of taking on the music room in Nashville, the capital of live music, Monet Masters jumped right in without hesitation—and soon decided the best way to make a statement was to skip the traditional lounge aesthetic (dark and moody) in favor of a light, bright space with serious flavor. To create this complete outdoor living space, Newport Beach, California, designer Barclay Butera chose coral, white, and blue powder-​coated finishes for the furniture, then layered them with hard-wearing indoor-outdoor fabrics from Kravet in a range of patterns.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Master Bedroom (Jackson Paige) + Kids' Rooms (Amy Berry)
programme.desc: Designer Kristine Paige Kamenstein, of Jackson Paige Interiors, thinks it should be both and focused on this when creating her space within the house. Also, Dallas-​based designer Amy Berry had this in mind when she wrapped the boy's room in a mural of the Virginia countryside, and the girl's in a French blue toile.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Home Office (Dani Arps) + Media Room (Modern Remains)
programme.desc: Danielle Arps, founder of the buzzy firm Dani Arps, is a fan of a minimal aesthetic, and when designing this home office, she imagined it as if she were the client. Lauren Moore of the design trio Modern Remains built a platform in the back of the media room to showcase multiple shelving units that could hold art, books, and collectibles.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.desc: Nashville kitchen and bath designer Richard Anuszkiewicz was determined to take a narrow passageway between the master bedroom and closet and turn it into a retreat. “Everything in this bath is light and bright, so it immediately feels relaxing,” he says. Kitchen-and-bath expert Matthew Quinn starts with what's practical. “I obsess over saving people time—because time equals luxury,” he says. “In this kitchen, I focused on saving steps: from the garage to the fridge, from the dishwasher to the cabinet. It all adds up.”

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.desc: Imagine building your dream space to not only be beautiful, but do draw you in, activate all of your senses, and make you feel happier from the moment you open the door. This was our goal with this home in Nashville.

programme.title: What's For Sale?

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: As early as 1690, German settlers left Europe for religious freedom in the new world of North America. They settled in the Philadelphia area, and immediately started to contribute to the innovations and spirit of our new country. In this episode, Chef Walter Staib prepares ale-braised sausages and shows us how his German ancestors helped to make America great.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Philadelphia's docks were very busy in the 18th century, receiving ships from as far away as Portugal, laden with precious cargo, Madeira wine. George Washington and the rest of the country was in love with this new wine, which was all the rage in America. Chef Staib prepares Chicken Madeira using this wine along with Spätzle and Chestnut Fritters.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Wild geese were plentiful in 18th Century America and were prized both for their meat and their layer of fat. Chef Staib prepares a typical winter meal of Goose with Turnips, along with Crab Cake with Herb Remoulade. We also visit Harriton House and see how a root cellar was a key part of 18th Century kitchens.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: General von Steuben was a German officer who volunteered to help Washington battle the British monarchy. He instituted a discipline to the rag tag army that made them a determined fighting force that would eventually win the war. Chef Staib prepares Braised Rabbit Legs and Potato Cakes in honor of his favorite Continental soldier, General von Steuben.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: We start a special four-part series cooking in Thomas Jefferson's actual kitchen at Monticello, his Virginia home. Chef Staib prepares Jefferson's favorite exotic dish, Stuffed Cabbage with Fried Asparagus. We also tour Jefferson's gardens, where we learn how important discovering and growing foods was to our third President.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Discover why Rye Coffee became a popular drink in America after President Jefferson and Congress imposed a foreign trade embargo in 1807. Chef Walter shows how rye was harvested, made into bread and brewed to drink. From the kitchen at Harriton House, Chef prepares Madeira Onion Soup, Periwinkles (sea snails), Beef Tongue with Caper Sauce and Pennsylvania Dutch Dumplings.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Coffee came to Jamaica in 1740. We climb Jamaica's famous Blue Mountains to visit a modern-day coffee plantation, and Chef Walter prepares an elaborate Jamaican Plantation brunch.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Colonial Williamsburg is one of the oldest settlements in America, and the British assumed it would become America's capital. Today, visitors can experience an entire village of Colonial life and authentic foods. Chef Staib cooks in Peyton Randolph's kitchen, preparing Chicken Vermicelli Soup, Veal Fricassée and Curried Rice Pilaf.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib explores one of Philadelphia's longest running coffee producers and prepares java-inspired recipes such as: Coffee-marinated Tenderloin of Beef, Coffee-Infused Diver Scallops, Coffee Cake and more!”

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: A real farmer's breakfast with potato hash, eggs, and Damn Hot Peppers. We'll finish with Verbena Coffee and a refreshing honey zabaglione that you can make ahead and chill or serve warm. We'll drop in on Michael's hometown of Turlock, California.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E01
programme.desc: In this episode, we head straight into the heart of New Zealand! We begin back in time, in an era of proud warriors and ancient traditions with Tamaki Maori Village, the most award-winning cultural attraction in New Zealand. Then we step through Hell's Gate and experience the country's most unique geothermal occurrence. Eager to catch our breath, we lose it walking amongst the breathing majestic giants at Redwood Tree Walk. And finally, arrive in Hobbiton. Yes, that Hobbiton of lore!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E02
programme.desc: In this episode, we seek refuge in Waiheke, New Zealand. Stonyridge Vineyards, a farm that is less about cropping and all about farming flavor- proves to be a fine locality from which to begin this episodic excursion into paradise. Unsurprisingly, our appetite for ingesting the best of this region leads us to the nutrient-rich, Te Matuku Marine Reserve- where we learn the value of a keystone species of the ecosystem... OYSTERS! Bellyful and bound to take a dip, we meander to Waiheke Island Resor

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E03
programme.desc: In this episode, we admire history from up high while visiting the oldest surviving lighthouse on mainland Australia. Then, we enter into a passionate relationship between an unordinary couple that involves alpacas. Next, our own expectations are blown away by retreating at the 12 Apostles/Alkina Lodge! Following that, we find a soulmate to our fellow animals at Great Ocean Road Wildlife Park. And finally, take a seat at the comfortable whiskey bar at Timboon Distillery before walking on top of

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E04
programme.desc: In this episode, we arrive in Sydney by departing into the Ken Done realm of artistry. Set a spin, we then roam the regions of Coffs Harbour and Urunga! Partaking in a happiness revolution in the shape of a grocery store (The Happy Frog) to paddle-boarding with direct descendants of the world's first stand up paddlers down a historical stream- this episode highlights the aim of being open to diversity in epic forms!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E05
programme.desc: In this episode, we "hang" with some friends abseiling over Southbank Parklands! Then we gather our courage and ascend the Story Bridge. Next, we mount some horses and find ourselves prospecting for gemstones at Thunderbird Park. Finally, we pull over and unwind in koala territory up on Mount Tambourine.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E06
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover where Australia begins by embarking down the Mulgrave River on an exclusive day tour out to the Frankland Islands. Next, we explore a bit of cultural history by spearfishing alongside the Daintree Rainforest. Then we go full eco-touristic while visiting a revered sanctuary of wildlife, Hartley's Crocodile Adventure! Ultimately, we arrive at Fitzroy Island Retreat. Enough said!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E07
programme.desc: In this episode, we pursue the spirit of ambition while discovering Hawaii's immortal culture! From walking the hallowed grounds of Hilo Coffee Mill to witnessing the reinvention of traditions at Old Lahaina Luau- this episode represents the best of what is to be expected while traveling wide-eyed through paradise!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E08
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit The Island of Hawaii better known as “The Big Island.” Here, we explore the history and geography of the islands, learn how to Hula Dance, visit a tranquil secluded retreat, learn the art of lei-making, and have some sea and land adventures!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E09
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the taste of pacific cuisine. From Hawaiian fusion and the beloved coffee bean to New Zealand oysters and tropical fish, Didiayer shares a variety of tastes around the pacific rim.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E10
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore culture old and new through a variety of unique destinations. Whether it be doing the Haka with a Maori tribe, weaving alpaca hair, or getting the real story behind the Hawaiian Luau, this episode dives in to the customs that bring people together.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E11
programme.desc: In this episode, we step out and in to nature to explore what adventure awaits. Amongst rappelling, zip-lining, horseback riding, snorkeling with dolphins and feeding crocodiles there is hardly a moment to catch your breath!

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: Dog's Best Friend
programme.sub-title: Aspen (Hawk) and Ohses (Newfie, Border collie, beagle Mix) / Gracie (Mammoth Donkey) and Jerry (Jersey Cow)
programme.desc: Aspen, a hawk, and Ohses, a Newfie, Border Collie, Beagle mix could not be more different, but their relationship is as symbiotic as they come! A Jersey cow named Jerry finds true friendship in Gracie with attitude who you might say is well, stubborn as a donkey!

programme.title: Dog's Best Friend
programme.sub-title: Willow (Pyrenees Mix Dog) and Billy (Miniature Goat) / Charlie (Lamb) and Dora (Cat)
programme.desc: Billy, a Pygmy goat and Willow, a very pregnant dog are thick as thieves at a busy little farm. Question is, how will Billy take to the new puppies? A rescue cat named Dora became the guardian angel to Charlie, an orphaned lamb and helped nurse him back to health, now they're best friends!

programme.title: Into Farm Animals Minds
programme.desc: Goats can ask humans for help... programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Slip and Mudslide
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
programme.desc: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention. From terrifying twisters to radical rain, we've got it all....and over the next half hour, you'll see 25 of the most insane weather ever caught on camera. Get comfortable, because you're about to experience Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No

programme.desc: Get ready, because the forecast says you're in for a blustery day, followed by some heavy rain, and a slight chance of a tornado. It may seem out of the ordinary, but that's just another day in paradise here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Since day one when Abilene Maverick “accidently” poured tea on Stephy Slays, Stephy has endured Abilene's teasing and bullying. After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set. Will the bullying finally get slayed? And after weeks of avoiding The Beast, Tessa Blanchard must put it all on the line to prove she is the industries best in an epic Main Event Match for The WOW World Championship Title. Will The Beast finally make her mark?!

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. But did Tessa read the fine print in her contract? Action and chaos in the WOW Tag Team Division continues. And The Fabulous Lana Star stoops to a new level of in-ring-disrespect as she aims to secure victory through her prodigy, The Lioness at all costs. The shocking Main Event will determine who secures a championship title match against The Biggest, The Baddest, The WOW World Champion….The Beast!

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard's feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW. A vicious hallway attack changes the course of the Tag Team division. And a new competitor from the toxic underground makes her WOW debut. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard's feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight's Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit. The Beast puts her WOW World Championship on the line by announcing an open challenge to the entire WOW roster. And Stephy Slays seeks retribution against the aggressor of her tag team partner Keta Rush's brutal attack.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self proclaimed “Grits N Glam” duo Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold. The Beast gets more than she bargained for while defending her title against The Temptress. Tensions rise between The Fabulous Lana Star and her prodigy The Lioness. And the WOW World Championship Titles are on the line as a newly formed dynamic team takes their shot at the champs, Fire and Adrenaline.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast, but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez, creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target. The Disciplinarian and Samantha Smart aim to take away the sunshine from new WOW competitor, Cali Ray. The relationship between Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal is tested. And The Psycho Sisters, Razor and Fury accompanied by Mezmeriah continue down their unpredictable path of destruction towards the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: Sunday Funday
